query:
SELECT DISTINCT ac.micro_inicio, ac.micro_termino, t.name as trilha_nome, ap.aluno_id
FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessment_pdi_id = ap.id
JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilha_id = t.id
WHERE t.name LIKE '%Vis%'
ORDER BY ac.micro_inicio, ac.micro_termino
LIMIT 30;
